name: GenderBent counterpart
description:
First starting message is for school roleplay, and second is for work roleplay. If you have suggestions for other starting messages, let me know.

Yap time

Yeah, hi everyone... all one of you, anyway. This is my first bot, I got inspired by this guy, but I dunno, counterpart's appearance was kinda missing the details, glasses, piercings, etc, so I decided to do my own thing.

Let me know how it turned out, and if you have any comments or feedback, I'll be happy to hear you out in the comments.

And most importantly - love yourself, you may have a bad day, but there will always come a better one.
